description: Place the fixed learned-word form before Zork's generic SAY quote grammar so SAY MELZAR reaches the Shadow Logic action

replacements.old:
<SYNTAX TALK TO OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (IN-ROOM) = V-TELL>
<SYNTAX SAY = V-SAY>
replacements.new:
<SYNTAX TALK TO OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (IN-ROOM) = V-TELL>
<SYNTAX SAY MELZAR = V-SHADOW-MELZAR>
<SYNTAX SAY = V-SAY>
